title: abarema clypearia f. prainiana
intro: Abarema clypearia f. prainiana, also known as Prain's cluster-leaf or the cluster-leaf tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abarema clypearia f. prainiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are prepared by boiling the leaves or bark in water and consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
